holdings.infoBox: IJJ is an equity ETF with a total of 311 individual holdings. The top holdings are Reliance stock at N/A, TD SYNNEX at N/A, US Foods Holding at N/A, Alcoa at N/A, and WESCO International at N/A.

overview.description: The iShares S&P Mid-Cap 400 Value ETF (IJJ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Mid Cap 400 Value index. The fund tracks an index of US mid-cap value firms from the committee-selected S&P 400 using three fundamental factors. IJJ was launched on Jul 24, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.
